text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm going shopping with Ticket and Taishin on our
next day off. I just hope we reach our
destination...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket is always lured in by the food samples, so
she tends to take the main street. Meanwhile,
Taishin hates crowds and sticks to the alleyways...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I have to devise some way for all of us to get to
our destination without getting separated...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I've got it... We'll just have to hold hands!
